description:
Reentrancy in Shares.transfer(address,uint256) (src/shares/Shares.sol#200-204):
	External calls:
	- __validateSharesTransfer({_from:msg.sender,_to:_to,_amount:_amount}) (src/shares/Shares.sol#201)
		- ISharesTransferValidator(sharesTransferValidator).validateSharesTransfer({_from:_from,_to:_to,_amount:_amount}) (src/shares/Shares.sol#217-218)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- super.transfer(_to,_amount) (src/shares/Shares.sol#203)
		- $ = ERC20StorageLocation (lib/openzeppelin-contracts-upgradeable/contracts/token/ERC20/ERC20Upgradeable.sol#48)
